understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' by moving horizontally and allowing gravity to carry the character downward (or upward) through breakable blocks, while avoiding spike hazards. Finish the current BP35 level and then continue until the game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: MOVE_LEFT and MOVE_RIGHT cause horizontal displacement, then the character falls automatically in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid tile, hitting a spike, or reaching the goal. CLICK removes breakable blocks ('x') at a specified position, often opening a fall path. UNDO reverses the last action, allowing recovery from mistakes. Gravity DOWN means the character falls toward smaller y-values (up on screen); Gravity UP means falling toward larger y-values. Each level has 50 steps per attempt and 2 attempts; spikes ('u'/'v') end the attempt immediately. Landing previews (left_landing/right_landing) and corridor scans guide movement decisions.
